nodes.name: sciona.molecular_docking.map_to_udg
nodes.conceptual_summary: Grouped atoms sharing an upstream family or module.
nodes.decomposition_rationale: Replaces singleton atom subpackages with a flat module layout.

nodes.name: graphtoudgmapping
nodes.description: Certify a graph as a unit-disk graph mapping without adding layout-induced edges.

inputs.name: G
inputs.constraints: NetworkX-like graph with existing or certifiable 2D node positions

outputs.name: result
outputs.constraints: copy of the input graph with certified radius-one UDG positions

nodes.conceptual_summary: Unit-disk embedding certification. It preserves the input node and edge set, writes a radius-one 2D position mapping, and rejects embeddings where the unit-disk rule would add or drop an edge.
nodes.critic_notes: Remediated from an unsafe spectral-layout edge generator to an edge-preserving certification contract.
